display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«system of interest» block : ReelCut
— black box node —
caps: ingest, segment, curate, render,
caption, master, re-media, export
constraint: 127.0.0.1 only · stdlib + FFmpeg

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«external» block : Creator (actor)
caps: record, decide keep/order, choose media
constraint: non-expert (0 training)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«external» block : Viewer / Audience
caps: watch, read captions
constraint: arbitrary device

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«external» block : Capture Device
(phone cam / camera)
caps: record A/V
constraint: variable codec, rate

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«external» block : Media Library
(local photos & audio)
caps: store reusable assets
constraint: on local disk only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«external» block : Host Filesystem
caps: store upload + render dirs
constraint: local; reference property

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«external» block : Web Browser
caps: render HMI, run wizard JS
constraint: localhost origin

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«external» block : FFmpeg / ffprobe
caps: decode, filter-graph, loudnorm, probe
constraint: CLI subprocess

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«external» block : Whisper ASR (optional)
caps: speech→timed text
constraint: optional; offline model

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«environment» block : Android Phone
caps: capture, host future client
constraint HC-1: ≥ Galaxy S23

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«environment» block : iPhone
caps: capture, host future client
constraint HC-1: ≥ iPhone 11

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
«external» block : Publishing Destination
(social / storage — optional)
caps: host finished video
constraint: user-initiated egress only
